data.body:
## Description

Create `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lifecycle.sh`:
1. Accept `--base-path=<dir>` (default: $REPO_ROOT/.tickets-tracker)
2. Bulk compact: find all tickets with >10 events, run ticket-compact.sh --threshold=10 --skip-sync for each
3. Archive: call `python3 ticket-graph.py --archive-eligible --tickets-dir=<base>` to get eligible tickets, write ARCHIVED event for each
4. Single git commit: stage all changes, commit with message 'chore: ticket lifecycle — bulk compact and archive'
5. 3-retry fetch-rebase-push loop: fetch, rebase, push. On non-fast-forward, retry up to 3 times.
6. Idempotent: safe to run multiple times (compact skips already-compacted, archive skips already-archived)

## File Impact
- Create: `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lifecycle.sh`
- Modify: `.test-index` (remove RED marker)

## TDD Requirement (GREEN)
Task b1c3-47a7 tests go GREEN.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lifecycle.sh
- [ ] All lifecycle tests pass GREEN
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-lifecycle.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAILED: 0'
